ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., simple, configurable, bundled) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "attribute_set_code" TEXT /* Code of the attribute set assigned to the product */,
  "store_view_code" TEXT /* Code of the store view where the product is displayed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive, out of stock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "tax_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax class for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_store_view_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_view_code") REFERENCES store_views ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_attribute_set_code FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_set_code") REFERENCES attribute_sets ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical structure */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "sort_order" INTEGER /* Order in which categories should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_sets" (
  "attribute_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute set */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the attribute set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute set */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the attribute set is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_views" (
  "store_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store view */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the store view */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the store view */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the store view */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the store view */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code used in the store view */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the store view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_attribute_sets" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "attribute_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "attribute_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_store_views" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_view_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store view */,
  "special_price" REAL /* Special price for the product in the specific store view */,
  "special_price_from" TEXT /* Start date for the special price */,
  "special_price_to" TEXT /* End date for the special price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "store_view_id")
)
